title: Lafocuse Version 3.0 Metal Day of The Week Wall Clock for Seniors 12 Inch, Silent Non Ticking Modern Silver Wall Clocks for Living Room Decor Bedroom Home, Ideal Retirement Gift for Men & Women
features: What Day Is It? You Will Know It: This wall clock is not only a time teller, but also a reminder of the day of the week and a great tool to teach kids to tell time and days of week. We've upgraded the day of the week hand to make it more obvious. With this clock, you will never need to put in the effort to remember what day of the week it is again!

No Annoying Ticking: The quiet sweep movement allows the clock hands to move continuously around the dial with no-ticking. It won't affect your family's sleeping or working efficiency. (Note: Battery is not provided.)

High Quality: Brushed metal frame, metal hands, excellent HD glass front cover, sturdy ABS back cover, silent movement make our clock work longer. After operated by 1 AA battery, the precise quartz movement will guarantee accurate time.

Ideal Gift: This functional clock would be an exquisite gift to express your best wishes. You can send it as a retirement present to your parents or friends on Christmas, birthdays, Mother's Day, Father's Day and Thanksgiving Day!

Broad Application: Diameter in 12" (30 cm). It can be a practical addition to the living room, kitchen, dining room, bedroom, study room, lounge, hall, break room, office, meeting room, bar, restaurant or any other rooms in your home.
3-Year Movement Assurance: If the clock has any quality problem with movement in 3 years, please no hesitate to contact us. We'll give you a solution as soon as possible.
